input.content:
# FA_rating ← 8L per-group ([REDACTED]07)

**Câu hỏi user**: dùng phân nhóm 8L (router bank/cyclical/power/compounder/RE/sec/ins) để cải thiện FA_rating (`tav2_bq.fa_ratings`, tier A–E) đang dùng trong các bản paper-trade V11/V12x. "Nếu integrated chưa tốt thì căn chỉnh lại rating cho hợp 8L."

## B1 — chẩn đoán per-group IC của FA phẳng hiện tại
FA cũ = composite 7 trục TRỌNG SỐ CỐ ĐỊNH, percentile TOÀN cohort, KHÔNG phân nhánh nhóm. Forward sạch (LEAD giá, point-in-time, KHÔNG dùng profit_*):
- **COMPOUNDER (n≈10k): đơn điệu HOÀN HẢO A→E** (med120 A+2.4→E−5.4, win .53→.42). Composite phẳng chạy tốt — đây là ~75% universe + lõi book.
- **CYCLICAL (n≈474): ĐẢO** — 120d D(+9.2)>C(+8.4)>A(+6.1). Tier thấp ở đáy chu kỳ = forward tốt nhất. FA phẳng vô dụng/hại đúng nhóm này.
- **POWER: nhiễu/đảo** (A tệ nhất). **BANK: A–D ổn** (A+8.6), chỉ E nhiễu n nhỏ.

## B2/B3 — dựng 8L 1–5 theo lịch sử + map A–E per-group
`rating_8l_history.py`: port `rate_row()` của `rating_8l.py` lên FULL ticker_financial history (52k rows). COMPOUNDER/CYCLICAL/RE/SEC/INS tái lập CHÍNH XÁC point-in-time; BANK proxy ROE-only (NPL là snapshot, không có history), POWER proxy lifecycle D/E. **Map A–E = per-group percentile**: COMPOUNDER xếp theo core_score trong cross-section TỪNG QUÝ (khôi phục E-floor cân bằng); nhóm nhỏ giữ rating rời rạc 1→A..5→E. Bảng BQ `tav2_bq.fa_ratings_8l` (A5163/B10354/C15767/D13664/E7484).
- IC rating MỚI: **CYCLICAL hết đảo** (B+5.7/.60 tốt nhất, D/E âm); **COMPOUNDER E-floor khôi phục** (win .547→.400 đơn điệu); BANK sạch (E-floor, 100% historical). SECURITIES vẫn đảo ở đỉnh (broker ROE cao=đỉnh chu kỳ) ⚠ nhỏ.
→ **8L per-group LÀ rating tốt hơn khi đứng RIÊNG.** ✅

## B4 — full-NAV V11 book (BAL+VN30=V1), prod-spec params, controlled A/B
2 signal pkl build từ cùng SIGNAL_V11 chỉ khác bảng FA. `run_fa8l_ab.py`:
- **Full −0.65pp** (17.16→16.51), Sharpe 1.18→1.14, **DD −20.4→−27.4**, Calmar 0.84→0.60.
- IS 2014-19 +2.81 nhưng **OOS 2020-now −4.22pp** (24.01→19.79), DD/Sharpe đều tệ hơn.
→ **THAY nguyên fa_tier trong book = THUA.** Book capacity-bound (12 slot) không hưởng; per-group đẩy thêm A/B value → lệch value, tụt sóng momentum-bull 2020+ (khớp "FA edge ZERO in BULL"). Tái xác nhận memory "BA-core momentum book RESISTS FA overlays".

## Cách tích hợp ĐÚNG (prior art `run_prodspec_rating_BC.py`, data/rating_8l_BC_prodspec.csv)
- **exclude5** (chặn cứng buy mã rating-5): V1 −0.60 ✗
- **regime_size** (giảm ½ size mã yếu rating≥4 CHỈ khi BEAR/CRISIS state≤2 qua `tier_weights_by_state`): **V1 +0.80, V5 +0.97, MỌI hệ CAGR+Sharpe+DD+Calmar tốt hơn** ✅✅ = "FA matters in stress".

## CHỐT
8L per-group cải thiện FA THẬT, nhưng **không phải thay cổng A/E** (thua) **mà điều tiết SIZE theo regime** (thắng). Khuyến nghị: (1) adopt `fa_ratings_8l` cho screener/dna_card/bot (rating standalone tốt hơn); (2) trong book dùng 8L qua regime_size, KHÔNG thay fa_tier. NEXT chưa làm: test regime_size dùng per-group E của tôi (calibrate tốt hơn rating≥4 cũ) — có thể ăn thêm. Files: rating_8l_history.py, build_fa8l_pkls.py, run_fa8l_ab.py, data/fa8l_ab_navs.csv, bảng BQ fa_ratings_8l.

1	# Memory Index
2	
3	- 🔬 **[HAG forensic — lãi không bền ([REDACTED]07)](hag_earnings_forensic_2026.md)** — Hoàng Anh Gia Lai: lõi sầu riêng+heo ~1,2–1,6T/năm THẬT nhưng lãi TTM ~2,9T phóng đại bởi MỘT-LẦN. Phép thử NP>GP bắt "siêu quý" phi lõi: 2019Q3(+609,lãi thoái vốn THADI), 2023Q4(+626), 2025Q4(+197), 2026Q1(+488,~75-80% lãi phi lõi). Bệnh kinh niên CFO ÂM khi báo lãi (chuyển đổi tiền ~44%, DSO tới 400d, AR 10T≈vượt DT năm=bên liên quan). 2 đợt bỏ hợp nhất co TS 53,4T→18,2T (−66%); 2025Q4-26Q1 AR sụp 10T→2,1T mà TS chỉ −1,5T=footprint cấn trừ/giảm hợp nhất KHÔNG phải tiền tươi → dấu vân tay GIỐNG các đợt cũ. PE6,7/PB1,23="rẻ ảo". 8L=4/5 đầu cơ. **FCF ÂM 11 năm liên tiếp (cộng dồn ~−31T)**: vốn tái đầu tư đến từ NỢ(đỉnh 27T/2016)→BÁN TS(53,4T→18,2T)→PHA LOÃNG CP +37%(2024-25), CHƯA TỪNG từ vận hành = serial capital-consumer. Nghi ngờ dòng tiền user=ĐÚNG. Định giá trên lõi chuẩn hóa.
4	
5	- 🚚 **[VVS/xe tải TQ — đỉnh chu kỳ infra ([REDACTED]07)](vvs_truck_distribution_cycle_2026.md)** — VVS=VIMID (Howo "Hổ vồ" Sinotruk) +572%/1Y bỏ xa ngành = tăng trưởng THẬT (cp giữ 21.5M, LN 8.4→166 tỷ, ROE→74%) nhưng ĐỈNH CHU KỲ không moat. Thắng=xe tải nặng biên 6% (vs đại lý xe con HAX/CTF/SVC biên 0.15-0.44%) × sóng đầu tư công × operating leverage × HoSE. Event-study: VVS PB_z +1.19 = mã DUY NHẤT đắt vs lịch sử, cả cohort infra (HPG/DHA/TMT/HTL/NNC) PB_z âm → re-rating CẠN, dư địa rẻ ở DHA/TMT/HTL. Trip-wires đảo: biên<4% 2Q, DSO>180d+DT giảm tốc, inv>80-100d, CFO/NP<0, FSCORE≤4. Risk: AR=71% tài sản (53 tỷ tiền). workspace/vvs_truck_cycle_tracker.md.

Trip-wires đảo: biên<4% 2Q, DSO>180d+DT giảm tốc, inv>80-100d, CFO/NP<0, FSCORE≤4. Risk: AR=71% tài sản (53 tỷ tiền). workspace/vvs_truck_cycle_tracker.md.

content.text:
## Tóm tắt & khuyến nghị

Tôi đã chạy trọn vòng **chẩn đoán → dựng rating → validate full-NAV** và có kết luận chắc bằng số:

**Việc đã hoàn thành**
- Bảng BQ `tav2_bq.fa_ratings_8l` — rating 8L per-group theo lịch sử, point-in-time, A–E cân bằng (đã giữ lại).
- 3 script: `rating_8l_history.py` (dựng panel), `build_fa8l_pkls.py` (2 signal pkl cô lập hiệu ứng FA), `run_fa8l_ab.py` (A/B full-NAV).
- Kết quả + memory đã lưu.

**Phát hiện cốt lõi (trả lời trực tiếp ý của anh):**
> 8L per-group **đúng là cải thiện FA_rating** — nhưng chỉ khi đứng riêng (rating sạch hơn) và khi tích hợp bằng **điều tiết tỷ trọng theo regime**, KHÔNG phải thay nguyên cổng A/E (thay = thua −4.22pp OOS, DD nở 7pp).

**Khuyến nghị triển khai (2 nhánh tách bạch):**
1. **Screener / dna_card / bot** → adopt `fa_ratings_8l`. Đây là nơi rating đứng riêng, không bị book capacity-bound che lấp; per-group IC đã chứng minh tốt hơn rõ.
2. **Paper-trade book (V11/V12x)** → **đừng thay fa_tier**. Tích hợp qua `regime_size` (giảm ½ size mã yếu khi BEAR/CRISIS) — prior art đã cho +0.8–1.0pp mọi hệ, kèm DD tốt hơn.

**Bước tiếp có thể ăn thêm (chưa làm):** `regime_size` cũ flag "mã yếu" bằng `rating≥4` rời rạc. Per-group E của tôi calibrate tốt hơn (E thật sự là 15% kém nhất TRONG nhóm). Test `regime_size` dùng tier D/E của `fa_ratings_8l` thay cho `rating≥4` có thể cải thiện thêm — đây là hướng tối ưu duy nhất còn lại đáng thử.

Anh muốn tôi **chạy luôn biến thể `regime_size` dùng per-group E** để xem có nhỉnh hơn `+0.8–1.0pp` của bản gốc không, hay dừng ở đây và tôi giúp wire `fa_ratings_8l` vào screener/bot trước?

content.text:
Rõ. Tôi sẽ test `regime_size` với weak-flag = **tier D/E của `fa_ratings_8l`** so với bản gốc **rating≥4**, cùng một harness book (kiểm soát chặt). Khác biệt thực chất nằm ở COMPOUNDER: rating≥4 (tuyệt đối, gắn cờ ~55% — rất rộng) vs tier D/E (percentile đáy ~40% từng quý — chọn lọc hơn). Nhóm nhỏ thì rating≥4 ≡ D/E nên không đổi.

Viết `run_fa8l_regime.py`: dùng signal book gốc (fa cũ, chỉ overlay SIZE), merge as-of cả `rating` và `tier` từ panel lịch sử, chạy 3 mode base / regime_oldR / regime_DE qua hook `tier_weights_by_state`.

input.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""run_fa8l_regime.py — regime-conditional SIZE overlay on the V11 book, comparing the WEAK flag:
  base          — no size modulation (control)
  regime_oldR   — weak = 8L discrete rating>=4   (the prior-art run_prodspec_rating_BC regime_size)
  regime_DE     — weak = per-group tier in {D,E} from fa_ratings_8l (better-calibrated compounder bottom)
Weak buy-rows are HALVED (0.05 vs 0.10) ONLY in BEAR/CRISIS (state<=2) via tier_weights_by_state.
Book signal = the OLD-fa play_types (FAbase pkl); we only modulate SIZE, never the gate (the integration
that won in prior art). V1 book (BAL+VN30); Full / IS(2014-19) / OOS(2020-now).
"""
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import os, sys, io, pickle, re
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
WORKDIR=r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"; os.chdir(WORKDIR); sys.path.insert(0,WORKDIR)
from simulate_holistic_nav import simulate, bq

START_B="2014-01-01"; END_B="2026-05-15"
TOTAL_NAV=50_000_000_000; BOOK_NAV=TOTAL_NAV/2
DEPOSIT=0.0; BORROW=0.10; ETF_BASE={3:0.7}
TIER_BAL=["MEGA","MOMENTUM","MOMENTUM_N","MOMENTUM_S","DEEP_VALUE_RECOVERY","RE_BACKLOG_BUY"]
BUY_TIERS_V11={"MEGA","MOMENTUM","MOMENTUM_N","MOMENTUM_S","MOMENTUM_QUALITY",
               "MOMENTUM_A","MOMENTUM_S_N","COMPOUNDER_BUY","DEEP_VALUE_RECOVERY","S_PRO","RE_BACKLOG_BUY"}
MAX_POS=12; FULL_SIZE=0.10; WEAK_SIZE=0.05
STATE_CSV="vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v3_4b_full_history.csv"

print("[shared] VNI/open/state/universe...")
with open("sim_v11_for_analyzer.py","r",encoding="utf-8") as f: _c=f.read()
VNI_Q=re.search(r'^VNI_QUERY_UNIFIED\s*=\s*"""(.+?)"""', _c, re.MULTILINE|re.DOTALL).group(1)
vni_B=bq(VNI_Q.format(start=START_B,end=END_B)); vni_B["time"]=pd.to_datetime(vni_B["time"])
vni_dates_B=sorted(vni_B["time"].unique()); vn30_proxy=dict(zip(vni_B["time"],vni_B["Close"]))
_etf=bq(f"""SELECT t.time,t.Close FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t WHERE t.ticker='E1VFVN30'
 AND t.time BETWEEN DATE '{START_B}' AND DATE '{END_B}' ORDER BY t.time""")
_etf["time"]=pd.to_datetime(_etf["time"]); _er=dict(zip(_etf["time"],_etf["Close"]))
_sp=_etf["time"].min(); _sc=(_er[_sp]/vn30_proxy[_sp]) if vn30_proxy.get(_sp) else 1.0
vn30_underlying={}
for d in vni_dates_B:
    if d in _er: vn30_underlying[d]=_er[d]
    elif d<_sp and d in vn30_proxy: vn30_underlying[d]=vn30_proxy[d]*_sc
    elif d in vn30_proxy: vn30_underlying[d]=vn30_proxy[d]
opens_df=bq(f"""SELECT t.ticker,t.time,t.Open AS open_price FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t
 WHERE t.time BETWEEN DATE '{START_B}' AND DATE '{END_B}'
   AND t.ticker IN (SELECT DISTINCT t2.ticker FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune AS t2) AND t.Open IS NOT NULL""")
opens_df["time"]=pd.to_datetime(opens_df["time"])
open_prices={tk:dict(zip(g["time"],g["open_price"])) for tk,g in opens_df.groupby("ticker")}
vni_full=bq(f"""SELECT t.time,t.Close,t.MA200,t.D_RSI FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t
 WHERE t.ticker='VNINDEX' AND t.time BETWEEN DATE '{START_B}' AND DATE '{END_B}' ORDER BY t.time""")
vni_full["time"]=pd.to_datetime(vni_full["time"])
state_df=pd.read_csv(STATE_CSV); state_df["time"]=pd.to_datetime(state_df["time"])
state_df=state_df[(state_df["time"]>=START_B)&(state_df["time"]<=END_B)][["time","state"]]
sbd=dict(zip(state_df["time"],state_df["state"])); state_ff={}; last=None
for d in vni_dates_B:
    s=sbd.get(d)
    if s is not None: last=s
    state_ff[d]=last
v=vni_full.merge(state_df,on="time",how="left"); v["state"]=v["state"].ffill()
v["oh"]=((v["Close"]/v["MA200"]>1.30)&((v["state"]==5)|(v["D_RSI"]>0.75)))
oh_dates=set(v[v["oh"]]["time"])
top30=set(bq("""SELECT t.ticker FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t
 WHERE t.time BETWEEN DATE '2020-01-01' AND DATE '2025-01-01'
 AND t.ticker IN (SELECT DISTINCT t2.ticker FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune AS t2)
 GROUP BY t.ticker ORDER BY AVG(t.Volume_3M_P50*COALESCE(t.Price,t.Close)) DESC LIMIT 30""")["ticker"])
sec_map=bq("""SELECT DISTINCT t.ticker,CAST(FLOOR(t.ICB_Code/1000) AS INT64) AS s
 FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t WHERE t.ICB_Code IS NOT NULL""").set_index("ticker")["s"].to_dict()

def sv_tight_keep(row):
    s=row.get("state5"); days=row.get("days_since_release")
    if pd.isna(s): return True
    s=int(s)
    if s in (4,5): return True
    if s==1: return pd.notna(days) and days<=30
    if s in (2,3): return pd.notna(days) and days<=60
    return True

# ── load book signal (OLD fa play_types) + D1 + SV_TIGHT + overheat ──────────
print("[signal] FAbase book + D1 + SV_TIGHT + overheat...")
sig=pickle.load(open("ba_v11_FAbase_sig.pkl","rb")); sig["time"]=pd.to_datetime(sig["time"])
sig=sig[(sig["time"]>=START_B)&(sig["time"]<=END_B)].copy()
d1=bq(f"""
WITH adv_dated AS (SELECT f.ticker,f.time AS f_time,SAFE_DIVIDE(f.AdvCust_P0,NULLIF(f.AdvCust_P4,0))-1 AS adv_yoy,
   LEAD(f.time) OVER (PARTITION BY f.ticker ORDER BY f.time) AS next_f_time FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial AS f),
fa_dated AS (SELECT f.ticker,f.time AS f_time,f.tier AS fa_tier,
   LEAD(f.time) OVER (PARTITION BY f.ticker ORDER BY f.time) AS next_f_time FROM tav2_bq.fa_ratings AS f),
fin_dated AS (SELECT f.ticker,f.time AS fin_time,f.Revenue_YoY_P0,
   LEAD(f.time) OVER (PARTITION BY f.ticker ORDER BY f.time) AS next_fin_time FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial AS f)
SELECT t.ticker,t.time,fa.fa_tier,SAFE_DIVIDE(t.NP_P0,t.NP_P4)-1 AS np_yoy,fin.Revenue_YoY_P0 AS rev_yoy,
  adv.adv_yoy,s5.state AS state5
FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t
LEFT JOIN tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v34b_clean AS s5 ON s5.time=t.time
LEFT JOIN fa_dated AS fa ON fa.ticker=t.ticker AND t.time>=fa.f_time AND (fa.next_f_time IS NULL OR t.time<fa.next_f_time)
LEFT JOIN fin_dated AS fin ON fin.ticker=t.ticker AND t.time>=fin.fin_time AND (fin.next_fin_time IS NULL OR t.time<fin.next_fin_time)
LEFT JOIN adv_dated AS adv ON adv.ticker=t.ticker AND t.time>=adv.f_time AND (adv.next_f_time IS NULL OR t.time<adv.next_f_time)
WHERE t.ICB_Code=8633 AND t.time BETWEEN DATE '{START_B}' AND DATE '{END_B}'
  AND t.ticker IN (SELECT DISTINCT t2.ticker FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune AS t2)""")
d1["time"]=pd.to_datetime(d1["time"])
dm=(d1["adv_yoy"].notna()&(d1["adv_yoy"]>0.5)&d1["fa_tier"].isin(["C","D"])
    &d1["state5"].isin([3,4,5])&((d1["np_yoy"].fillna(-99)>0)|(d1["rev_yoy"].fillna(-99)>0)))
dq=d1.loc[dm,["ticker","time"]].assign(_d1=True)
sig=sig.merge(dq,on=["ticker","time"],how="left")
om=sig["_d1"].fillna(False)&(sig["ta"]>=120); sig.loc[om,"play_type"]="RE_BACKLOG_BUY"; sig=sig.drop(columns=["_d1"])
mb=sig["play_type"].isin(BUY_TIERS_V11)
sig=sig[(~mb)|sig.apply(sv_tight_keep,axis=1)].copy()
sig.loc[sig["time"].isin(oh_dates)&sig["play_type"].isin(BUY_TIERS_V11),"play_type"]="AVOID_overheated"

# ── attach point-in-time 8L rating + per-group tier (as-of by eff_date) ──────
print("[attach] 8L rating + per-group tier (as-of)...")
rh=pd.read_csv("data/rating_8l_history.csv")
rh["eff_date"]=pd.to_datetime(rh["eff_date"])
rh=rh.sort_values("eff_date")[["ticker","eff_date","rating","tier"]].rename(columns={"eff_date":"time","tier":"tier8l"})
sig=sig.sort_values("time")
sig=pd.merge_asof(sig, rh, on="time", by="ticker", direction="backward")
buy=sig["play_type"].isin(BUY_TIERS_V11)
print(f"  coverage buy-rows: rating={sig.loc[buy,'rating'].notna().mean():.1%} tier={sig.loc[buy,'tier8l'].notna().mean():.1%}")
print(f"  buy-rows flagged weak: rating>=4 -> {int(((sig['rating']>=4)&buy).sum()):,}  "
      f"tier in DE -> {int((sig['tier8l'].isin(['D','E'])&buy).sum()):,}")

LIQ_BASE={"liquidity_volume_pct":0.20,"max_fill_days":5,"exit_slippage_tiered":True}

def run_book(sig_use, prices, liq_map, allowed, twbs, exempt, vn30=False, label=""):
    if vn30:
        sig_use=sig_use[sig_use["ticker"].isin(top30)].copy()
        prices={tk:prices[tk] for tk in top30 if tk in prices}
        liq_map={k:vv for k,vv in liq_map.items() if k[0] in top30}
    LIQ={**LIQ_BASE,"liquidity_lookup":liq_map}
    kw=dict(allowed_tiers=allowed,max_positions=MAX_POS,hold_days=45,stop_loss=-0.20,
        min_hold=2,slippage=0.001,init_nav=BOOK_NAV,ticker_sector_map=sec_map,
        tier_weights={t:FULL_SIZE for t in allowed},tier_weights_by_state=twbs,
        deposit_annual=DEPOSIT,borrow_annual=BORROW,state_by_date=state_ff,
        cash_etf_states=ETF_BASE,vn30_underlying=vn30_underlying,
        etf_mgmt_fee_annual=0.0,etf_tracking_drag_annual=0.0,etf_rebalance_friction=0.0015,
        open_prices=open_prices,t1_open_exec=True,**LIQ,name=label)
    if not vn30:
        kw["sector_limit_per_sector"]={8:4}; kw["sector_cap_exempt_tiers"]=exempt
    nav,_=simulate(sig_use,prices,vni_dates_B,**kw)
    nav["time"]=pd.to_datetime(nav["time"]); return nav.set_index("time")["nav"]

def build_mode(mode):
    s=sig.copy()
    base_tiers=list(TIER_BAL); exempt={"RE_BACKLOG_BUY"}
    if mode=="base":
        return s, base_tiers, None, exempt
    if mode=="regime_oldR":
        weakmask=(s["rating"]>=4)
    else:  # regime_DE
        weakmask=s["tier8l"].isin(["D","E"])
    m=weakmask & s["play_type"].isin(set(base_tiers))
    s.loc[m,"play_type"]=s.loc[m,"play_type"]+"_W"
    weak_tiers=[t+"_W" for t in base_tiers]; allowed=base_tiers+weak_tiers
    twbs={st:{**{t:FULL_SIZE for t in base_tiers},**{t:WEAK_SIZE for t in weak_tiers}} for st in (1,2)}
    exempt={"RE_BACKLOG_BUY","RE_BACKLOG_BUY_W"}
    return s, allowed, twbs, exempt

def metrics(nav,a,b):
    s=nav[(nav.index>=a)&(nav.index<=b)].dropna()
    if len(s)<30: return None
    rets=s.pct_change().dropna(); yrs=(s.index[-1]-s.index[0]).days/365.25
    spy=len(rets)/yrs if yrs>0 else 252
    cagr=(s.iloc[-1]/s.iloc[0])**(1/yrs)-1 if yrs>0 else 0
    sh=rets.mean()/rets.std()*np.sqrt(spy) if rets.std()>0 else 0
    dd=((s-s.cummax())/s.cummax()).min(); cal=cagr/abs(dd) if dd<0 else 0
    return {"CAGR":cagr*100,"Sharpe":sh,"DD":dd*100,"Calmar":cal}

navs={}
for mode in ["base","regime_oldR","regime_DE"]:
    print(f"\n[run] {mode}")
    s,allowed,twbs,exempt=build_mode(mode)
    prices={tk:dict(zip(g["time"],g["Close"])) for tk,g in s.groupby("ticker")}
    liq_map={(r["ticker"],r["time"]):r["liq"] for _,r in s.iterrows()}
    bal=run_book(s,prices,liq_map,allowed,twbs,exempt,vn30=False,label=f"{mode}_BAL")
    v30=run_book(s,prices,liq_map,allowed,twbs,exempt,vn30=True,label=f"{mode}_VN30")
    common=bal.index.intersection(v30.index)
    navs[mode]=(bal.loc[common]+v30.loc[common])

common=navs["base"].index
for m in navs: common=common.intersection(navs[m].index)
segs=[("Full",common.min(),common.max()),
      ("IS 2014-2019",pd.Timestamp("2014-01-01"),pd.Timestamp("2019-12-31")),
      ("OOS 2020-now",pd.Timestamp("2020-01-01"),common.max())]
print("\n"+"="*100)
print("  V11 BOOK regime_size: weak-flag = rating>=4 (oldR) vs per-group tier D/E (DE)  —  Δ vs base")
print("="*100)
print(f"  {'Segment':<15}{'base CAGR/Sh/DD':<26}{'regime_oldR (Δ)':<30}{'regime_DE (Δ)':<30}")
for nm,a,b in segs:
    mb_=metrics(navs['base'].loc[common],a,b)
    mo=metrics(navs['regime_oldR'].loc[common],a,b)
    md=metrics(navs['regime_DE'].loc[common],a,b)
    if not(mb_ and mo and md): continue
    print(f"  {nm:<15}{mb_['CAGR']:6.2f}% {mb_['Sharpe']:.2f} {mb_['DD']:6.1f}    "
          f"{mo['CAGR']:6.2f}%({mo['CAGR']-mb_['CAGR']:+.2f}) Sh{mo['Sharpe']:.2f} DD{mo['DD']:.1f}   "
          f"{md['CAGR']:6.2f}%({md['CAGR']-mb_['CAGR']:+.2f}) Sh{md['Sharpe']:.2f} DD{md['DD']:.1f}")
pd.DataFrame({k:v.loc[common] for k,v in navs.items()}).to_csv("data/fa8l_regime_navs.csv")
print("\n  saved data/fa8l_regime_navs.csv\nDONE.")

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""run_fa8l_regime.py — regime-conditional SIZE overlay on the V11 book, comparing the WEAK flag:
  base          — no size modulation (control)
  regime_oldR   — weak = 8L discrete rating>=4   (the prior-art run_prodspec_rating_BC regime_size)
  regime_DE     — weak = per-group tier in {D,E} from fa_ratings_8l (better-calibrated compounder bottom)
Weak buy-rows are HALVED (0.05 vs 0.10) ONLY in BEAR/CRISIS (state<=2) via tier_weights_by_state.
Book signal = the OLD-fa play_types (FAbase pkl); we only modulate SIZE, never the gate (the integration
that won in prior art). V1 book (BAL+VN30); Full / IS(2014-19) / OOS(2020-now).
"""
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import os, sys, io, pickle, re
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
WORKDIR=r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"; os.chdir(WORKDIR); sys.path.insert(0,WORKDIR)
from simulate_holistic_nav import simulate, bq

START_B="2014-01-01"; END_B="2026-05-15"
TOTAL_NAV=50_000_000_000; BOOK_NAV=TOTAL_NAV/2
DEPOSIT=0.0; BORROW=0.10; ETF_BASE={3:0.7}
TIER_BAL=["MEGA","MOMENTUM","MOMENTUM_N","MOMENTUM_S","DEEP_VALUE_RECOVERY","RE_BACKLOG_BUY"]
BUY_TIERS_V11={"MEGA","MOMENTUM","MOMENTUM_N","MOMENTUM_S","MOMENTUM_QUALITY",
               "MOMENTUM_A","MOMENTUM_S_N","COMPOUNDER_BUY","DEEP_VALUE_RECOVERY","S_PRO","RE_BACKLOG_BUY"}
MAX_POS=12; FULL_SIZE=0.10; WEAK_SIZE=0.05
STATE_CSV="vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v3_4b_full_history.csv"

print("[shared] VNI/open/state/universe...")
with open("sim_v11_for_analyzer.py","r",encoding="utf-8") as f: _c=f.read()
VNI_Q=re.search(r'^VNI_QUERY_UNIFIED\s*=\s*"""(.+?)"""', _c, re.MULTILINE|re.DOTALL).group(1)
vni_B=bq(VNI_Q.format(start=START_B,end=END_B)); vni_B["time"]=pd.to_datetime(vni_B["time"])
vni_dates_B=sorted(vni_B["time"].unique()); vn30_proxy=dict(zip(vni_B["time"],vni_B["Close"]))
_etf=bq(f"""SELECT t.time,t.Close FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t WHERE t.ticker='E1VFVN30'
 AND t.time BETWEEN DATE '{START_B}' AND DATE '{END_B}' ORDER BY t.time""")
_etf["time"]=pd.to_datetime(_etf["time"]); _er=dict(zip(_etf["time"],_etf["Close"]))
_sp=_etf["time"].min(); _sc=(_er[_sp]/vn30_proxy[_sp]) if vn30_proxy.get(_sp) else 1.0
vn30_underlying={}
for d in vni_dates_B:
    if d in _er: vn30_underlying[d]=_er[d]
    elif d<_sp and d in vn30_proxy: vn30_underlying[d]=vn30_proxy[d]*_sc
    elif d in vn30_proxy: vn30_underlying[d]=vn30_proxy[d]
opens_df=bq(f"""SELECT t.ticker,t.time,t.Open AS open_price FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t
 WHERE t.time BETWEEN DATE '{START_B}' AND DATE '{END_B}'
   AND t.ticker IN (SELECT DISTINCT t2.ticker FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune AS t2) AND t.Open IS NOT NULL""")
opens_df["time"]=pd.to_datetime(opens_df["time"])
open_prices={tk:dict(zip(g["time"],g["open_price"])) for tk,g in opens_df.groupby("ticker")}
vni_full=bq(f"""SELECT t.time,t.Close,t.MA200,t.D_RSI FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t
 WHERE t.ticker='VNINDEX' AND t.time BETWEEN DATE '{START_B}' AND DATE '{END_B}' ORDER BY t.time""")
vni_full["time"]=pd.to_datetime(vni_full["time"])
state_df=pd.read_csv(STATE_CSV); state_df["time"]=pd.to_datetime(state_df["time"])
state_df=state_df[(state_df["time"]>=START_B)&(state_df["time"]<=END_B)][["time","state"]]
sbd=dict(zip(state_df["time"],state_df["state"])); state_ff={}; last=None
for d in vni_dates_B:
    s=sbd.get(d)
    if s is not None: last=s
    state_ff[d]=last
v=vni_full.merge(state_df,on="time",how="left"); v["state"]=v["state"].ffill()
v["oh"]=((v["Close"]/v["MA200"]>1.30)&((v["state"]==5)|(v["D_RSI"]>0.75)))
oh_dates=set(v[v["oh"]]["time"])
top30=set(bq("""SELECT t.ticker FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t
 WHERE t.time BETWEEN DATE '2020-01-01' AND DATE '2025-01-01'
 AND t.ticker IN (SELECT DISTINCT t2.ticker FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune AS t2)
 GROUP BY t.ticker ORDER BY AVG(t.Volume_3M_P50*COALESCE(t.Price,t.Close)) DESC LIMIT 30""")["ticker"])
sec_map=bq("""SELECT DISTINCT t.ticker,CAST(FLOOR(t.ICB_Code/1000) AS INT64) AS s
 FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t WHERE t.ICB_Code IS NOT NULL""").set_index("ticker")["s"].to_dict()

def sv_tight_keep(row):
    s=row.get("state5"); days=row.get("days_since_release")
    if pd.isna(s): return True
    s=int(s)
    if s in (4,5): return True
    if s==1: return pd.notna(days) and days<=30
    if s in (2,3): return pd.notna(days) and days<=60
    return True

# ── load book signal (OLD fa play_types) + D1 + SV_TIGHT + overheat ──────────
print("[signal] FAbase book + D1 + SV_TIGHT + overheat...")
sig=pickle.load(open("ba_v11_FAbase_sig.pkl","rb")); sig["time"]=pd.to_datetime(sig["time"])
sig=sig[(sig["time"]>=START_B)&(sig["time"]<=END_B)].copy()
d1=bq(f"""
WITH adv_dated AS (SELECT f.ticker,f.time AS f_time,SAFE_DIVIDE(f.AdvCust_P0,NULLIF(f.AdvCust_P4,0))-1 AS adv_yoy,
   LEAD(f.time) OVER (PARTITION BY f.ticker ORDER BY f.time) AS next_f_time FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial AS f),
fa_dated AS (SELECT f.ticker,f.time AS f_time,f.tier AS fa_tier,
   LEAD(f.time) OVER (PARTITION BY f.ticker ORDER BY f.time) AS next_f_time FROM tav2_bq.fa_ratings AS f),
fin_dated AS (SELECT f.ticker,f.time AS fin_time,f.Revenue_YoY_P0,
   LEAD(f.time) OVER (PARTITION BY f.ticker ORDER BY f.time) AS next_fin_time FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial AS f)
SELECT t.ticker,t.time,fa.fa_tier,SAFE_DIVIDE(t.NP_P0,t.NP_P4)-1 AS np_yoy,fin.Revenue_YoY_P0 AS rev_yoy,
  adv.adv_yoy,s5.state AS state5
FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t
LEFT JOIN tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v34b_clean AS s5 ON s5.time=t.time
LEFT JOIN fa_dated AS fa ON fa.ticker=t.ticker AND t.time>=fa.f_time AND (fa.next_f_time IS NULL OR t.time<fa.next_f_time)
LEFT JOIN fin_dated AS fin ON fin.ticker=t.ticker AND t.time>=fin.fin_time AND (fin.next_fin_time IS NULL OR t.time<fin.next_fin_time)
LEFT JOIN adv_dated AS adv ON adv.ticker=t.ticker AND t.time>=adv.f_time AND (adv.next_f_time IS NULL OR t.time<adv.next_f_time)
WHERE t.ICB_Code=8633 AND t.time BETWEEN DATE '{START_B}' AND DATE '{END_B}'
  AND t.ticker IN (SELECT DISTINCT t2.ticker FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune AS t2)""")
d1["time"]=pd.to_datetime(d1["time"])
dm=(d1["adv_yoy"].notna()&(d1["adv_yoy"]>0.5)&d1["fa_tier"].isin(["C","D"])
    &d1["state5"].isin([3,4,5])&((d1["np_yoy"].fillna(-99)>0)|(d1["rev_yoy"].fillna(-99)>0)))
dq=d1.loc[dm,["ticker","time"]].assign(_d1=True)
sig=sig.merge(dq,on=["ticker","time"],how="left")
om=sig["_d1"].fillna(False)&(sig["ta"]>=120); sig.loc[om,"play_type"]="RE_BACKLOG_BUY"; sig=sig.drop(columns=["_d1"])
mb=sig["play_type"].isin(BUY_TIERS_V11)
sig=sig[(~mb)|sig.apply(sv_tight_keep,axis=1)].copy()
sig.loc[sig["time"].isin(oh_dates)&sig["play_type"].isin(BUY_TIERS_V11),"play_type"]="AVOID_overheated"

# ── attach point-in-time 8L rating + per-group tier (as-of by eff_date) ──────
print("[attach] 8L rating + per-group tier (as-of)...")
rh=pd.read_csv("data/rating_8l_history.csv")
rh["eff_date"]=pd.to_datetime(rh["eff_date"])
rh=rh.sort_values("eff_date")[["ticker","eff_date","rating","tier"]].rename(columns={"eff_date":"time","tier":"tier8l"})
sig=sig.sort_values("time")
sig=pd.merge_asof(sig, rh, on="time", by="ticker", direction="backward")
buy=sig["play_type"].isin(BUY_TIERS_V11)
print(f"  coverage buy-rows: rating={sig.loc[buy,'rating'].notna().mean():.1%} tier={sig.loc[buy,'tier8l'].notna().mean():.1%}")
print(f"  buy-rows flagged weak: rating>=4 -> {int(((sig['rating']>=4)&buy).sum()):,}  "
      f"tier in DE -> {int((sig['tier8l'].isin(['D','E'])&buy).sum()):,}")

LIQ_BASE={"liquidity_volume_pct":0.20,"max_fill_days":5,"exit_slippage_tiered":True}

def run_book(sig_use, prices, liq_map, allowed, twbs, exempt, vn30=False, label=""):
    if vn30:
        sig_use=sig_use[sig_use["ticker"].isin(top30)].copy()
        prices={tk:prices[tk] for tk in top30 if tk in prices}
        liq_map={k:vv for k,vv in liq_map.items() if k[0] in top30}
    LIQ={**LIQ_BASE,"liquidity_lookup":liq_map}
    kw=dict(allowed_tiers=allowed,max_positions=MAX_POS,hold_days=45,stop_loss=-0.20,
        min_hold=2,slippage=0.001,init_nav=BOOK_NAV,ticker_sector_map=sec_map,
        tier_weights={t:FULL_SIZE for t in allowed},tier_weights_by_state=twbs,
        deposit_annual=DEPOSIT,borrow_annual=BORROW,state_by_date=state_ff,
        cash_etf_states=ETF_BASE,vn30_underlying=vn30_underlying,
        etf_mgmt_fee_annual=0.0,etf_tracking_drag_annual=0.0,etf_rebalance_friction=0.0015,
        open_prices=open_prices,t1_open_exec=True,**LIQ,name=label)
    if not vn30:
        kw["sector_limit_per_sector"]={8:4}; kw["sector_cap_exempt_tiers"]=exempt
    nav,_=simulate(sig_use,prices,vni_dates_B,**kw)
    nav["time"]=pd.to_datetime(nav["time"]); return nav.set_index("time")["nav"]

def build_mode(mode):
    s=sig.copy()
    base_tiers=list(TIER_BAL); exempt={"RE_BACKLOG_BUY"}
    if mode=="base":
        return s, base_tiers, None, exempt
    if mode=="regime_oldR":
        weakmask=(s["rating"]>=4)
    else:  # regime_DE
        weakmask=s["tier8l"].isin(["D","E"])
    m=weakmask & s["play_type"].isin(set(base_tiers))
    s.loc[m,"play_type"]=s.loc[m,"play_type"]+"_W"
    weak_tiers=[t+"_W" for t in base_tiers]; allowed=base_tiers+weak_tiers
    twbs={st:{**{t:FULL_SIZE for t in base_tiers},**{t:WEAK_SIZE for t in weak_tiers}} for st in (1,2)}
    exempt={"RE_BACKLOG_BUY","RE_BACKLOG_BUY_W"}
    return s, allowed, twbs, exempt

def metrics(nav,a,b):
    s=nav[(nav.index>=a)&(nav.index<=b)].dropna()
    if len(s)<30: return None
    rets=s.pct_change().dropna(); yrs=(s.index[-1]-s.index[0]).days/365.25
    spy=len(rets)/yrs if yrs>0 else 252
    cagr=(s.iloc[-1]/s.iloc[0])**(1/yrs)-1 if yrs>0 else 0
    sh=rets.mean()/rets.std()*np.sqrt(spy) if rets.std()>0 else 0
    dd=((s-s.cummax())/s.cummax()).min(); cal=cagr/abs(dd) if dd<0 else 0
    return {"CAGR":cagr*100,"Sharpe":sh,"DD":dd*100,"Calmar":cal}

navs={}
for mode in ["base","regime_oldR","regime_DE"]:
    print(f"\n[run] {mode}")
    s,allowed,twbs,exempt=build_mode(mode)
    prices={tk:dict(zip(g["time"],g["Close"])) for tk,g in s.groupby("ticker")}
    liq_map={(r["ticker"],r["time"]):r["liq"] for _,r in s.iterrows()}
    bal=run_book(s,prices,liq_map,allowed,twbs,exempt,vn30=False,label=f"{mode}_BAL")
    v30=run_book(s,prices,liq_map,allowed,twbs,exempt,vn30=True,label=f"{mode}_VN30")
    common=bal.index.intersection(v30.index)
    navs[mode]=(bal.loc[common]+v30.loc[common])

common=navs["base"].index
for m in navs: common=common.intersection(navs[m].index)
segs=[("Full",common.min(),common.max()),
      ("IS 2014-2019",pd.Timestamp("2014-01-01"),pd.Timestamp("2019-12-31")),
      ("OOS 2020-now",pd.Timestamp("2020-01-01"),common.max())]
print("\n"+"="*100)
print("  V11 BOOK regime_size: weak-flag = rating>=4 (oldR) vs per-group tier D/E (DE)  —  Δ vs base")
print("="*100)
print(f"  {'Segment':<15}{'base CAGR/Sh/DD':<26}{'regime_oldR (Δ)':<30}{'regime_DE (Δ)':<30}")
for nm,a,b in segs:
    mb_=metrics(navs['base'].loc[common],a,b)
    mo=metrics(navs['regime_oldR'].loc[common],a,b)
    md=metrics(navs['regime_DE'].loc[common],a,b)
    if not(mb_ and mo and md): continue
    print(f"  {nm:<15}{mb_['CAGR']:6.2f}% {mb_['Sharpe']:.2f} {mb_['DD']:6.1f}    "
          f"{mo['CAGR']:6.2f}%({mo['CAGR']-mb_['CAGR']:+.2f}) Sh{mo['Sharpe']:.2f} DD{mo['DD']:.1f}   "
          f"{md['CAGR']:6.2f}%({md['CAGR']-mb_['CAGR']:+.2f}) Sh{md['Sharpe']:.2f} DD{md['DD']:.1f}")
pd.DataFrame({k:v.loc[common] for k,v in navs.items()}).to_csv("data/fa8l_regime_navs.csv")
print("\n  saved data/fa8l_regime_navs.csv\nDONE.")

content.text:
Kết quả rất rõ và mang một insight tinh tế:

| Đoạn | base | **regime_oldR** (rating≥4, tuyệt đối) | **regime_DE** (tier D/E, tương đối) |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Full** | 17.18% Sh1.19 DD−20.4 | **17.92% (+0.73)** Sh1.23 DD−20.0 ✅ | 17.24% (+0.06) Sh1.20 DD−21.0 |
| IS 2014–19 | 10.35% Sh0.96 | 10.99% (+0.64) | 10.90% (+0.54) |
| **OOS 2020–now** | 23.96% Sh1.37 DD−19.0 | **24.79% (+0.84)** Sh1.41 ✅ | 23.51% **(−0.45)** Sh1.37 DD−21.0 |

`regime_oldR` tái lập đúng thắng lợi prior-art (+0.73 Full / +0.84 OOS, Sharpe & DD tốt hơn → harness đáng tin). Nhưng **`regime_DE` THUA** — gần như phẳng Full (+0.06) và **âm ở OOS (−0.45)**, DD tệ hơn.

## Insight cốt lõi (vì sao D/E thua cho mục đích này)

Đây là phát hiện đẹp, làm rõ tại sao mỗi calibration hợp một việc khác nhau:

- **Tier D/E là PERCENTILE TƯƠNG ĐỐI** (đáy 40% TRONG nhóm, mỗi quý). Dùng để **xếp hạng** thì đúng (so trong peer). Nhưng để **phòng thủ khi stress** thì sai: trong một nhóm toàn mạnh, đáy-40% tương đối vẫn không mong manh; ngược lại một mã yếu tuyệt đối nằm trong nhóm yếu có thể là B/C tương đối → **không bị giảm size dù đáng ra phải giảm**.
- **rating≥4 là YẾU TUYỆT ĐỐI** (ROIC thấp, đòn bẩy cao, FSCORE thấp theo ngưỡng cứng). Mong manh là chuyện **tuyệt đối, không tương đối** — nên khi BEAR/CRISIS, giảm ½ size đúng nhóm mã thật sự fragile → bảo vệ hiệu quả.

**→ Quy tắc chốt: percentile-tương-đối cho XẾP HẠNG (screener/bot); rating-tuyệt-đối cho PHÒNG THỦ-SIZE (book).** Dùng nhầm vai (D/E cho size) làm mất chính lợi ích.

Vậy câu hỏi anh đặt đã có đáp án dứt khoát: **không, tier D/E không thay được rating≥4** cho regime_size — bản tuyệt đối tốt hơn. Để tôi cập nhật memory.

## CHỐT
8L per-group cải thiện FA THẬT, nhưng **không phải thay cổng A/E** (thua) **mà điều tiết SIZE theo regime** (thắng). Khuyến nghị: (1) adopt `fa_ratings_8l` cho screener/dna_card/bot (rating standalone tốt hơn); (2) trong book dùng 8L qua regime_size, KHÔNG thay fa_tier. NEXT chưa làm: test regime_size dùng per-group E của tôi (calibrate tốt hơn rating≥4 cũ) — có thể ăn thêm. Files: rating_8l_history.py, build_fa8l_pkls.py, run_fa8l_ab.py, data/fa8l_ab_navs.csv, bảng BQ fa_ratings_8l.
input.new_string:
## B5 — regime_size: weak-flag rating≥4 (tuyệt đối) vs tier D/E (tương đối)
`run_fa8l_regime.py` (book V11, cùng harness, chỉ đổi weak-flag):
- **regime_oldR (rating≥4)**: Full **+0.73** (17.18→17.92), **OOS +0.84** (23.96→24.79), Sharpe↑ DD bằng/tốt → tái lập prior-art ✅
- **regime_DE (tier D/E)**: Full +0.06, **OOS −0.45**, DD tệ hơn → **THUA** ✗
→ **INSIGHT**: percentile TƯƠNG ĐỐI (D/E, đáy nhóm) hợp XẾP HẠNG (so peer) nhưng SAI cho phòng-thủ-size — fragility là chuyện TUYỆT ĐỐI (ROIC/đòn bẩy/FSCORE ngưỡng cứng), không tương đối. rating≥4 (tuyệt đối) bắt đúng mã mong manh khi stress. **Dùng nhầm vai làm mất lợi ích.**

## CHỐT
8L per-group cải thiện FA THẬT, nhưng **không thay cổng A/E** (thua −4.22pp OOS) **mà điều tiết SIZE theo regime** (thắng +0.73/+0.84). VÀ phải dùng ĐÚNG calibration cho đúng vai:
1. **Screener/dna_card/bot** → adopt `fa_ratings_8l` (percentile tương đối, xếp hạng trong peer). ✅
2. **Book V11/V12x** → regime_size với **rating 8L TUYỆT ĐỐI ≥4** (cột `rating` trong panel, KHÔNG phải tier D/E percentile), giảm ½ size khi BEAR/CRISIS. KHÔNG thay fa_tier. ✅
Files: rating_8l_history.py, build_fa8l_pkls.py, run_fa8l_ab.py (thay-cổng=thua), run_fa8l_regime.py (size: oldR thắng/DE thua), data/fa8l_{ab,regime}_navs.csv, BQ fa_ratings_8l.

toolUseResult.originalFile:
# FA_rating ← 8L per-group ([REDACTED]07)

**Câu hỏi user**: dùng phân nhóm 8L (router bank/cyclical/power/compounder/RE/sec/ins) để cải thiện FA_rating (`tav2_bq.fa_ratings`, tier A–E) đang dùng trong các bản paper-trade V11/V12x. "Nếu integrated chưa tốt thì căn chỉnh lại rating cho hợp 8L."

## B1 — chẩn đoán per-group IC của FA phẳng hiện tại
FA cũ = composite 7 trục TRỌNG SỐ CỐ ĐỊNH, percentile TOÀN cohort, KHÔNG phân nhánh nhóm. Forward sạch (LEAD giá, point-in-time, KHÔNG dùng profit_*):
- **COMPOUNDER (n≈10k): đơn điệu HOÀN HẢO A→E** (med120 A+2.4→E−5.4, win .53→.42). Composite phẳng chạy tốt — đây là ~75% universe + lõi book.
- **CYCLICAL (n≈474): ĐẢO** — 120d D(+9.2)>C(+8.4)>A(+6.1). Tier thấp ở đáy chu kỳ = forward tốt nhất. FA phẳng vô dụng/hại đúng nhóm này.
- **POWER: nhiễu/đảo** (A tệ nhất). **BANK: A–D ổn** (A+8.6), chỉ E nhiễu n nhỏ.

## B2/B3 — dựng 8L 1–5 theo lịch sử + map A–E per-group
`rating_8l_history.py`: port `rate_row()` của `rating_8l.py` lên FULL ticker_financial history (52k rows). COMPOUNDER/CYCLICAL/RE/SEC/INS tái lập CHÍNH XÁC point-in-time; BANK proxy ROE-only (NPL là snapshot, không có history), POWER proxy lifecycle D/E. **Map A–E = per-group percentile**: COMPOUNDER xếp theo core_score trong cross-section TỪNG QUÝ (khôi phục E-floor cân bằng); nhóm nhỏ giữ rating rời rạc 1→A..5→E. Bảng BQ `tav2_bq.fa_ratings_8l` (A5163/B10354/C15767/D13664/E7484).
- IC rating MỚI: **CYCLICAL hết đảo** (B+5.7/.60 tốt nhất, D/E âm); **COMPOUNDER E-floor khôi phục** (win .547→.400 đơn điệu); BANK sạch (E-floor, 100% historical). SECURITIES vẫn đảo ở đỉnh (broker ROE cao=đỉnh chu kỳ) ⚠ nhỏ.
→ **8L per-group LÀ rating tốt hơn khi đứng RIÊNG.** ✅

## B4 — full-NAV V11 book (BAL+VN30=V1), prod-spec params, controlled A/B
2 signal pkl build từ cùng SIGNAL_V11 chỉ khác bảng FA. `run_fa8l_ab.py`:
- **Full −0.65pp** (17.16→16.51), Sharpe 1.18→1.14, **DD −20.4→−27.4**, Calmar 0.84→0.60.
- IS 2014-19 +2.81 nhưng **OOS 2020-now −4.22pp** (24.01→19.79), DD/Sharpe đều tệ hơn.
→ **THAY nguyên fa_tier trong book = THUA.** Book capacity-bound (12 slot) không hưởng; per-group đẩy thêm A/B value → lệch value, tụt sóng momentum-bull 2020+ (khớp "FA edge ZERO in BULL"). Tái xác nhận memory "BA-core momentum book RESISTS FA overlays".

## Cách tích hợp ĐÚNG (prior art `run_prodspec_rating_BC.py`, data/rating_8l_BC_prodspec.csv)
- **exclude5** (chặn cứng buy mã rating-5): V1 −0.60 ✗
- **regime_size** (giảm ½ size mã yếu rating≥4 CHỈ khi BEAR/CRISIS state≤2 qua `tier_weights_by_state`): **V1 +0.80, V5 +0.97, MỌI hệ CAGR+Sharpe+DD+Calmar tốt hơn** ✅✅ = "FA matters in stress".

## CHỐT
8L per-group cải thiện FA THẬT, nhưng **không phải thay cổng A/E** (thua) **mà điều tiết SIZE theo regime** (thắng). Khuyến nghị: (1) adopt `fa_ratings_8l` cho screener/dna_card/bot (rating standalone tốt hơn); (2) trong book dùng 8L qua regime_size, KHÔNG thay fa_tier. NEXT chưa làm: test regime_size dùng per-group E của tôi (calibrate tốt hơn rating≥4 cũ) — có thể ăn thêm. Files: rating_8l_history.py, build_fa8l_pkls.py, run_fa8l_ab.py, data/fa8l_ab_navs.csv, bảng BQ fa_ratings_8l.

content.text:
## Tổng kết toàn bộ nghiên cứu (B1 → B5)

Anh đặt câu hỏi: dùng phân nhóm 8L để cải thiện FA_rating trên paper-trade. Tôi đã chạy trọn vòng và có đáp án dứt khoát bằng số:

**Đã chứng minh:**
1. **FA phẳng hiện tại sai ở đâu** (B1): đơn điệu hoàn hảo cho COMPOUNDER, nhưng **đảo ở CYCLICAL**, nhiễu ở POWER.
2. **8L per-group là rating tốt hơn khi đứng riêng** (B2–B3): cyclical hết đảo, compounder khôi phục E-floor, bank sạch 100% point-in-time.
3. **Thay nguyên fa_tier trong book = THUA** (B4): Full −0.65, **OOS −4.22pp**, DD nở 7pp. Book capacity-bound kháng việc xáo cổng FA.
4. **regime_size = cách tích hợp đúng** (B5): +0.73 Full / +0.84 OOS — nhưng **chỉ với rating tuyệt đối ≥4**; thử tier D/E percentile theo yêu cầu của anh thì **thua** (OOS −0.45).

**Insight đắt nhất:** cùng một rating 8L nhưng hai calibration phục vụ hai vai khác nhau —
- **Percentile tương đối** (tier A–E theo nhóm) → cho **xếp hạng** (screener/bot).
- **Rating tuyệt đối 1–5** (ngưỡng cứng ROIC/đòn bẩy/FSCORE) → cho **phòng thủ size khi stress** (book). Fragility là tuyệt đối, không tương đối — dùng nhầm vai làm mất lợi ích.

**Khuyến nghị triển khai:**
| Nơi dùng | Dùng gì |
|---|---|
| Screener / dna_card / bot | `tav2_bq.fa_ratings_8l` (per-group A–E, đã tạo sẵn) |
| Paper-trade book V11/V12x | regime_size với **rating tuyệt đối ≥4**, giảm ½ size khi BEAR/CRISIS — **KHÔNG thay fa_tier** |

**Artefacts để lại:** bảng BQ `fa_ratings_8l`; scripts `rating_8l_history.py`, `build_fa8l_pkls.py`, `run_fa8l_ab.py`, `run_fa8l_regime.py`; NAV `data/fa8l_{ab,regime}_navs.csv`; memory đã lưu.

Bước triển khai thực tế còn lại (nếu anh muốn): wire `fa_ratings_8l` vào `unified_screener.py`/`dna_card.py`, và bật `regime_size` (rating≥4) thành mặc định trong các bản pt_* — cả hai đều thấp rủi ro vì đã validate. Anh muốn tôi làm nhánh nào trước?

content.text:
Khảo sát cho thấy bức tranh rõ ràng — và làm gọn việc lại đáng kể:

- **Deliverable A (screener) gần như ĐÃ XONG**: `unified_screener.py:383-388` **đã** merge 8L rating per-group từ `data/rating_8l.csv` (do `rating_8l.py` sinh live). Tức screener đang dùng đúng rating per-group mà tôi vừa validate là tốt-hơn-cho-xếp-hạng. Không có bảng `fa_ratings` phẳng nào cần thay ở đây.
- **Phía book** (`signal_v11_sql`, `recommend_tomorrow`, `golive_recommend`) dùng `fa_ratings` phẳng cho play_type — và nghiên cứu nói **ĐỪNG thay** (thay = thua). Đây đúng là nơi cần **THÊM regime_size** (điều tiết size), không thay cổng.

Nên việc thực chất còn lại là **Deliverable B: wire regime_size (rating≥4) vào book**. Một điểm quan trọng giúp an toàn: regime_size **chỉ kích hoạt khi BEAR/CRISIS (state≤2)**; thị trường từ 4/2026 đang NEUTRAL → thêm vào các tracker live **không đổi hành vi hiện tại**, chỉ bật bảo vệ khi stress ập tới. Vậy "đặt default trong pt_*" vừa đúng ý anh vừa không phá thí nghiệm Apr–Sept.

bq load --replace --source_format=CSV --skip_leading_rows=1 --project_id=[REDACTED] \
  tav2_bq.tmp_r8l ./data/rating_8l_history.csv \
  ticker:STRING,eff_date:DATE,q_time:DATE,route:STRING,rating:INT64,core_score:INT64,tier:STRING >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "tmp loaded"
bq query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id=[REDACTED] '
CREATE OR REPLACE TABLE tav2_bq.fa_ratings_8l AS
SELECT tk AS ticker, eff_date AS time, ANY_VALUE(route) AS route,
       ANY_VALUE(rating) AS rating, ANY_VALUE(tier) AS tier
FROM (
  SELECT h.ticker AS tk, h.eff_date, h.route, h.rating, h.tier,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY h.ticker, h.eff_date ORDER BY h.q_time DESC) rn
  FROM tav2_bq.tmp_r8l AS h)
WHERE rn=1 GROUP BY tk, eff_date'
bq rm -f -t [REDACTED]:tav2_bq.tmp_r8l >/dev/null 2>&1
echo "--- verify ---"
bq query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id=[REDACTED] --format=prettyjson '
SELECT COUNT(*) n, COUNT(DISTINCT f.ticker) tk, MIN(f.time) mn, MAX(f.time) mx,
  COUNTIF(f.rating>=4) weak FROM tav2_bq.fa_ratings_8l AS f'

content.text: Bảng có `rating`+`tier`, phủ 2014-07→2026-06 (hiện tại), 1281 mã. **Bước 2 — helper dùng chung** `regime_size_overlay.py` để mọi pt_* wire bằng vài dòng, logic tập trung một chỗ (dễ kiểm soát/rollback).

input.content:
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""regime_size_overlay.py — VALIDATED 8L-rating integration for the V11/V12x books.

Research (memory: fa_rating_8l_pergroup_2026): replacing the flat fa_tier with the 8L per-group rating
LOSES at full-NAV (OOS -4.22pp). The integration that WINS is regime-conditional SIZE modulation:
keep weak names at full weight in good regimes, HALVE them only in BEAR/CRISIS (state<=2). Prior art
+0.73 Full / +0.84 OOS, Sharpe & DD better, across all systems. The weak flag must be the ABSOLUTE 8L
rating>=4 (genuine fragility: low ROIC / high real-leverage / weak FSCORE), NOT the per-group percentile
tier D/E (relative — that LOST, OOS -0.45: fragility is absolute, not relative-to-peers).

Dormant in NEUTRAL/BULL/EX-BULL (state>=3) -> adding it to a live paper-trade changes NOTHING until a
stress regime hits, then it provides the validated protection. Safe to deploy as default.

Usage in a pt_* script (after SV_TIGHT/P3, before simulate):
    from regime_size_overlay import apply_regime_size
    sig_f, RS = apply_regime_size(sig_f, START_DATE, END_DATE, bq, base_tiers=TIER_BAL)
    # then in EACH simulate() call:
    #   allowed_tiers          = RS["allowed_tiers"]
    #   tier_weights           = RS["tier_weights"]
    #   tier_weights_by_state  = RS["tier_weights_by_state"]
    #   sector_cap_exempt_tiers= RS["sector_cap_exempt"]   # BAL book only (keeps RE_BACKLOG_BUY exempt)
"""
import pandas as pd

FULL_SIZE = 0.10
WEAK_SIZE = 0.05          # halved weight for rating>=4 names in BEAR/CRISIS
STRESS_STATES = (1, 2)    # CRISIS, BEAR
WEAK_RATING_MIN = 4       # absolute 8L rating >= 4 = fragile (NOT the per-group percentile tier)

# default book buy tiers that carry position weight (BAL leg)
DEFAULT_BASE_TIERS = ["MEGA","MOMENTUM","MOMENTUM_N","MOMENTUM_S","DEEP_VALUE_RECOVERY","RE_BACKLOG_BUY"]
DEFAULT_BUY_TIERS  = {"MEGA","MOMENTUM","MOMENTUM_N","MOMENTUM_S","MOMENTUM_QUALITY",
                      "MOMENTUM_A","MOMENTUM_S_N","COMPOUNDER_BUY","DEEP_VALUE_RECOVERY","S_PRO","RE_BACKLOG_BUY"}


def load_rating8l(start, end, bq):
    """Point-in-time ABSOLUTE 8L rating (1-5) per (ticker, eff_date) from tav2_bq.fa_ratings_8l.
    Returns a DataFrame [ticker, time, rating8l] sorted by time (ready for merge_asof)."""
    df = bq(f"""SELECT f.ticker, f.time, f.rating AS rating8l
    FROM tav2_bq.fa_ratings_8l AS f
    WHERE f.time <= DATE '{end}'""")
    df["time"] = pd.to_datetime(df["time"])
    return df.sort_values("time")[["ticker","time","rating8l"]]


def apply_regime_size(sig, start, end, bq, base_tiers=None, buy_tiers=None,
                      full_size=FULL_SIZE, weak_size=WEAK_SIZE, rating_df=None):
    """Attach point-in-time 8L rating, split weak (rating>=4) buy rows into '<tier>_W', and return the
    simulate() config that halves the _W tiers ONLY in stress states (1,2). Non-stress states keep full
    size, so the overlay is dormant outside BEAR/CRISIS.

    Returns (sig_out, RS) where RS has allowed_tiers / tier_weights / tier_weights_by_state / sector_cap_exempt.
    """
    base_tiers = list(base_tiers) if base_tiers is not None else list(DEFAULT_BASE_TIERS)
    buy_tiers  = set(buy_tiers) if buy_tiers is not None else set(DEFAULT_BUY_TIERS)
    s = sig.copy()
    s["time"] = pd.to_datetime(s["time"])

    rd = rating_df if rating_df is not None else load_rating8l(start, end, bq)
    s = s.sort_values("time")
    s = pd.merge_asof(s, rd, on="time", by="ticker", direction="backward")

    weak_mask = (s["rating8l"] >= WEAK_RATING_MIN) & s["play_type"].isin(set(base_tiers))
    n_weak = int(weak_mask.sum())
    s.loc[weak_mask, "play_type"] = s.loc[weak_mask, "play_type"].astype(str) + "_W"

    weak_tiers = [t + "_W" for t in base_tiers]
    allowed = base_tiers + weak_tiers
    twbs = {st: {**{t: full_size for t in base_tiers}, **{t: weak_size for t in weak_tiers}}
            for st in STRESS_STATES}
    exempt = {"RE_BACKLOG_BUY", "RE_BACKLOG_BUY_W"}
    cov = s["rating8l"].notna().mean()
    print(f"  [regime_size] rating coverage {cov:.1%}; weak buy-rows flagged (rating>={WEAK_RATING_MIN}): "
          f"{n_weak:,} -> halved to {weak_size:.0%} ONLY in BEAR/CRISIS (state<=2), full {full_size:.0%} elsewhere")
    RS = dict(allowed_tiers=allowed,
              tier_weights={t: full_size for t in allowed},
              tier_weights_by_state=twbs,
              sector_cap_exempt=exempt)
    return s, RS

            for st in STRESS_STATES}
    exempt = {"RE_BACKLOG_BUY", "RE_BACKLOG_BUY_W"}
    cov = s["rating8l"].notna().mean()
    print(f"  [regime_size] rating coverage {cov:.1%}; weak buy-rows flagged (rating>={WEAK_RATING_MIN}): "
          f"{n_weak:,} -> halved to {weak_size:.0%} ONLY in BEAR/CRISIS (state<=2), full {full_size:.0%} elsewhere")
    RS = dict(allowed_tiers=allowed,
              tier_weights={t: full_size for t in allowed},
              tier_weights_by_state=twbs,
              sector_cap_exempt=exempt)
    return s, RS

mb = sig["play_type"].isin(BUY_TIERS_V11)
mk = (~mb) | sig.apply(sv_tight_keep, axis=1)
sig_f = sig[mk].copy()
mp3 = sig_f["time"].isin(overheat_dates) & sig_f["play_type"].isin(BUY_TIERS_V11)
sig_f.loc[mp3,"play_type"] = "AVOID_overheated"
print(f"  D1 reclassified: {int(omask.sum())}; SV_TIGHT filtered: {int((mb & ~sig.apply(sv_tight_keep,axis=1)).sum())}; P3 blocked: {int(mp3.sum())}")

# [BINARY_STRIPPED]
# 3. Common data (prices, opens, sec_map, ETF prices, state ff, top30)
# [BINARY_STRIPPED]
print("\n[3] Loading prices/Open/sector/E1VFVN30/top30...")
opens_df = bq(f"""SELECT t.ticker, t.time, t.Open AS open_price FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t
WHERE t.time BETWEEN DATE '{START_DATE}' AND DATE '{END_DATE}'
  AND t.ticker IN (SELECT DISTINCT t2.ticker FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune AS t2)
  AND t.Open IS NOT NULL""")
opens_df["time"] = pd.to_datetime(opens_df["time"])
open_prices = {tk: dict(zip(g["time"], g["open_price"])) for tk,g in opens_df.groupby("ticker")}
prices = {tk: dict(zip(g["time"], g["Close"])) for tk,g in sig_f.groupby("ticker")}
liq_map = {(r["ticker"],r["time"]): r["liq"] for _,r in sig_f.iterrows()}

mb = sig["play_type"].isin(BUY_TIERS_V11)
mk = (~mb) | sig.apply(sv_tight_keep, axis=1)
sig_f = sig[mk].copy()
mp3 = sig_f["time"].isin(overheat_dates) & sig_f["play_type"].isin(BUY_TIERS_V11)
sig_f.loc[mp3,"play_type"] = "AVOID_overheated"
print(f"  D1 reclassified: {int(omask.sum())}; SV_TIGHT filtered: {int((mb & ~sig.apply(sv_tight_keep,axis=1)).sum())}; P3 blocked: {int(mp3.sum())}")

# [BINARY_STRIPPED]
# 3. Common data (prices, opens, sec_map, ETF prices, state ff)
# [BINARY_STRIPPED]
print("\n[3] Loading prices/Open/sector/E1VFVN30...")
opens_df = bq(f"""SELECT t.ticker, t.time, t.Open AS open_price FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t
WHERE t.time BETWEEN DATE '{START_DATE}' AND DATE '{END_DATE}'
  AND t.ticker IN (SELECT DISTINCT t2.ticker FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune AS t2)
  AND t.Open IS NOT NULL""")
opens_df["time"] = pd.to_datetime(opens_df["time"])
open_prices = {tk: dict(zip(g["time"], g["open_price"])) for tk,g in opens_df.groupby("ticker")}
prices = {tk: dict(zip(g["time"], g["Close"])) for tk,g in sig_f.groupby("ticker")}
liq_map = {(r["ticker"],r["time"]): r["liq"] for _,r in sig_f.iterrows()}

vni = bq(VNI_QUERY.format(start=START_DATE, end=END_DATE))
vni["time"] = pd.to_datetime(vni["time"])
vni_dates = sorted(vni["time"].unique())

etf_real = bq(f"""SELECT t.time, t.Close FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t
WHERE t.ticker='E1VFVN30' AND t.time BETWEEN DATE '{START_DATE}' AND DATE '{END_DATE}' ORDER BY t.time""")
etf_real["time"] = pd.to_datetime(etf_real["time"])
vn30_underlying = dict(zip(etf_real["time"], etf_real["Close"]))

sec_map = bq("""SELECT DISTINCT t.ticker, CAST(FLOOR(t.ICB_Code/1000) AS INT64) AS s
FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t WHERE t.ICB_Code IS NOT NULL
  AND t.ticker IN (SELECT DISTINCT t2.ticker FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune AS t2)""").set_index("ticker")["s"].to_dict()

state_ff = {}; last_s=None
for d in vni_dates:
    s = state_by_date.get(d)
    if s is not None: last_s = s
    state_ff[d] = last_s

LIQ_FULL = {"liquidity_volume_pct":0.20,"max_fill_days":5,
            "liquidity_lookup":liq_map,"exit_slippage_tiered":True}

# [BINARY_STRIPPED]
# 4. Run BAL book @ 25B (with transparent event_log + etf_log)
# [BINARY_STRIPPED]
print("\n[4] Running BAL book @ 25B...")
events_bal = []; etf_bal = []
nav_bal, trades_bal = simulate(sig_f, prices, vni_dates,
    allowed_tiers=TIER_BAL, max_positions=MAX_POS_V11, hold_days=45, stop_loss=-0.20,
    min_hold=2, slippage=0.0, init_nav=BAL_NAV,
    sector_limit_per_sector={8:4}, ticker_sector_map=sec_map,
    sector_cap_exempt_tiers=SECTOR_CAP_EXEMPT,
    tier_weights=TIER_WEIGHTS_V11,
    deposit_annual=0.0, borrow_annual=0.10, state_by_date=state_ff,  # deposit=0% / borrow=10% (user 2026-05-23)
    cash_etf_states={3:0.7}, vn30_underlying=vn30_underlying,
    etf_mgmt_fee_annual=0.0, etf_tracking_drag_annual=0.0,
    etf_rebalance_friction=0.0015,
    open_prices=open_prices, t1_open_exec=True,
    entry_alt_prices=alt_hybrid, entry_fill_mode="v4_hybrid",
    event_log=events_bal, etf_log=etf_bal,
    force_close_eod=False,
    **LIQ_FULL, name="pt_v12_tq34b_BAL")
nav_bal["time"] = pd.to_datetime(nav_bal["time"])
print(f"  BAL events: {len(events_bal)} stock + {len(etf_bal)} ETF; closed_trades={len(trades_bal)}")
print(f"  BAL final: {nav_bal.set_index('time')['nav'].iloc[-1]/1e9:.4f}B")

# [BINARY_STRIPPED]
# 5. Run LAGGED book @ 25B (transparent loop with event emission)
# [BINARY_STRIPPED]
print("\n[5] Running LAGGED book @ 25B (transparent)...")

nav_bal, trades_bal = simulate(sig_f, prices, vni_dates,
    allowed_tiers=TIER_BAL, max_positions=MAX_POS_V11, hold_days=45, stop_loss=-0.20,
    min_hold=2, slippage=0.0, init_nav=BAL_NAV,
    sector_limit_per_sector={8:4}, ticker_sector_map=sec_map,
    sector_cap_exempt_tiers=SECTOR_CAP_EXEMPT,
    tier_weights=TIER_WEIGHTS_V11,
    deposit_annual=0.0, borrow_annual=0.10, state_by_date=state_ff,  # deposit=0% / borrow=10% (user 2026-05-23)
    cash_etf_states={3:0.7}, vn30_underlying=vn30_underlying,
    etf_mgmt_fee_annual=0.0, etf_tracking_drag_annual=0.0,
    etf_rebalance_friction=0.0015,
    open_prices=open_prices, t1_open_exec=True,
    entry_alt_prices=alt_hybrid, entry_fill_mode="v4_hybrid",
    event_log=events_bal, etf_log=etf_bal,
    force_close_eod=False,
    **LIQ_FULL, name="pt_v4_dt5g_BAL")
nav_bal["time"] = pd.to_datetime(nav_bal["time"])
print(f"  BAL events: {len(events_bal)} stock + {len(etf_bal)} ETF; final: {nav_bal.set_index('time')['nav'].iloc[-1]/1e9:.4f}B")

# [BINARY_STRIPPED]
# 6. Run VN30 book @ 25B (transparent — for V11 mode of switched leg)

liq_vn30 = {k: v for k,v in liq_map.items() if k[0] in top30}
LIQ_V30 = {**LIQ_FULL, "liquidity_lookup": liq_vn30}
nav_v30, trades_v30 = simulate(sig_vn30, prices_vn30, vni_dates,
    allowed_tiers=TIER_BAL, max_positions=MAX_POS_V11, hold_days=45, stop_loss=-0.20,
    min_hold=2, slippage=0.0, init_nav=SECOND_NAV,
    ticker_sector_map=sec_map,
    tier_weights=TIER_WEIGHTS_V11,
    deposit_annual=0.0, borrow_annual=0.10, state_by_date=state_ff,  # deposit=0% / borrow=10% (user 2026-05-23)

content.content:
1	# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
2	"""
3	golive_recommend.py  —  LAYER 2: V4 + DT5G daily order/position recommender.
4	
5	Consumes the gated DT5G state (published by publish_gated_state.py to BQ
6	tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_dt5g_live) and the live SIGNAL_V11, then emits TODAY's
7	actionable recommendations for the V4 system (V121_ENS + BASE parking {3:0.7}):
8	
9	  • Market regime (gated state5 today) + ETF parking target (BASE)
10	  • Ensemble mode today  -> which 2nd-leg book is active (VN30 vs LAGGED)
11	  • BAL book   ([REDACTED]-on 50%): ranked BA-core picks, max 12 pos, 10%/pos, Fin/RE cap 4
12	  • 2nd leg 50%: VN30 book picks (if VN30-mode) OR LAGGED earnings-drift entries due today
13	  • Fail-safe: state source = whatever publish_gated_state chose (DT5G or DT4) — read from json
14	
15	Output: deploy_golive_dt5g_v4/out/golive_recommendations_<DATE>.{md,csv}
16	
17	This is a point-in-time ("today") snapshot of the SAME signal+filter+ensemble logic
18	validated in run_5systems_dt4.py — NOT a NAV backtest. It tells the desk what to hold/
19	buy/sell today; position sizing is 10% NAV/slot (BASE), ETF parks idle cash in NEUTRAL.
20	"""
21	import os, sys, io, re, json, pickle
22	from datetime import datetime, timedelta
23	import numpy as np, pandas as pd
24	
25	sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
26	WORKDIR = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
27	os.chdir(WORKDIR); sys.path.insert(0, WORKDIR)
28	from simulate_holistic_nav import bq
29	from signal_v11_sql import SIGNAL_V11
30	
31	OUTDIR = os.path.join(WORKDIR, "deploy_golive_dt5g_v4", "out"); os.makedirs(OUTDIR, exist_ok=True)
32	DT_TABLE = "vnindex_5state_dt5g_live"     # gated DT5G series published by Layer 1
33	END = datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d")
34	START = (datetime.now() - timedelta(days=120)).strftime("%Y-%m-%d")  # recent window for "today"
35	MAX_POS = 12; POS_PCT = 0.10
36	TIER_BAL = ["MEGA","MOMENTUM","MOMENTUM_N","MOMENTUM_S","DEEP_VALUE_RECOVERY","RE_BACKLOG_BUY"]
37	BUY_TIERS = {"MEGA","MOMENTUM","MOMENTUM_N","MOMENTUM_S","MOMENTUM_QUALITY","MOMENTUM_A",
38	             "MOMENTUM_S_N","COMPOUNDER_BUY","DEEP_VALUE_RECOVERY","S_PRO","RE_BACKLOG_BUY"}
39	PRIORITY = {t: i for i, t in enumerate(TIER_BAL)}     # lower = higher priority
40	ETF_BASE = {3: 0.7}                                   # V4 BASE parking: 70% idle cash to ETF in NEUTRAL
41	SNAME = {1: "CRISIS", 2: "BEAR", 3: "NEUTRAL", 4: "BULL", 5: "EX-BULL"}
42	
43	print("=" * 90); print(f"  V4 + DT5G — DAILY RECOMMENDATIONS  ({END})"); print("=" * 90)
44	
45	# ── provenance: which state source did the gate pick? ──
46	prov = {}
47	try:
48	    prov = json.load(open(os.path.join(WORKDIR, "deploy_golive_dt5g_v4", "golive_state_today.json"), encoding="utf-8"))
49	    print(f"  state source: {prov.get('source')} | as_of {prov.get('as_of')} | state {prov.get('state')} ({SNAME.get(prov.get('state'),'?')})")
50	except Exception as e:
51	    print(f"  WARNING: golive_state_today.json missing ({e}); run publish_gated_state.py first")
52	
53	# ── 1. signals with state5 from the gated DT5G series ──
54	SIG = SIGNAL_V11.replace("tav2_bq.vnindex_5state AS s", "tav2_bq." + DT_TABLE + " AS s")
55	sig = bq(SIG.format(start=START, end=END)); sig["time"] = pd.to_datetime(sig["time"])
56	LATEST = sig["time"].max()
57	state_today = int(sig.loc[sig["time"] == LATEST, "state5"].dropna().iloc[0]) if (sig["time"] == LATEST).any() else int(prov.get("state", 3))
58	print(f"  latest signal date: {LATEST.date()} | {len(sig):,} signal rows in window")
59	
60	# ── 2. D1 RE_BACKLOG (gated state) + SV_TIGHT + overheat (same logic as run_5systems_dt4) ──
61	d1 = bq(f"""WITH adv_dated AS (SELECT f.ticker,f.time AS f_time,SAFE_DIVIDE(f.AdvCust_P0,NULLIF(f.AdvCust_P4,0))-1 AS adv_yoy,
62	  LEAD(f.time) OVER (PARTITION BY f.ticker ORDER BY f.time) AS next_f_time FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial AS f),
63	fa_dated AS (SELECT f.ticker,f.time AS f_time,f.tier AS fa_tier,LEAD(f.time) OVER (PARTITION BY f.ticker ORDER BY f.time) AS next_f_time FROM tav2_bq.fa_ratings AS f),
64	fin_dated AS (SELECT f.ticker,f.time AS fin_time,f.Revenue_YoY_P0,LEAD(f.time) OVER (PARTITION BY f.ticker ORDER BY f.time) AS next_fin_time FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial AS f)
65	SELECT t.ticker,t.time,fa.fa_tier,SAFE_DIVIDE(t.NP_P0,t.NP_P4)-1 AS np_yoy,fin.Revenue_YoY_P0 AS rev_yoy,adv.adv_yoy,s5.state AS state5
66	FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t LEFT JOIN tav2_bq.{DT_TABLE} AS s5 ON s5.time=t.time
67	LEFT JOIN fa_dated AS fa ON fa.ticker=t.ticker AND t.time>=fa.f_time AND (fa.next_f_time IS NULL OR t.time<fa.next_f_time)
68	LEFT JOIN fin_dated AS fin ON fin.ticker=t.ticker AND t.time>=fin.fin_time AND (fin.next_fin_time IS NULL OR t.time<fin.next_fin_time)
69	LEFT JOIN adv_dated AS adv ON adv.ticker=t.ticker AND t.time>=adv.f_time AND (adv.next_f_time IS NULL OR t.time<adv.next_f_time)
70	WHERE t.ICB_Code=8633 AND t.time BETWEEN DATE '{START}' AND DATE '{END}' AND t.ticker IN (SELECT DISTINCT t2.ticker FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune AS t2)""")
71	d1["time"] = pd.to_datetime(d1["time"])
72	d1m = (d1["adv_yoy"].notna() & (d1["adv_yoy"] > 0.5) & d1["fa_tier"].isin(["C", "D"]) & d1["state5"].isin([3,4,5]) & ((d1["np_yoy"].fillna(-99) > 0) | (d1["rev_yoy"].fillna(-99) > 0)))
73	sig = sig.merge(d1.loc[d1m, ["ticker", "time"]].assign(_ok=True), on=["ticker", "time"], how="left")
74	om = sig["_ok"].fillna(False) & (sig["ta"] >= 120); sig.loc[om, "play_type"] = "RE_BACKLOG_BUY"; sig = sig.drop(columns=["_ok"])
75	
76	def svk(r):
77	    s = r.get("state5"); d = r.get("days_since_release")
78	    if pd.isna(s): return True
79	    s = int(s)
80	    if s in (4, 5): return True
81	    if s == 1: return pd.notna(d) and d <= 30
82	    if s in (2, 3): return pd.notna(d) and d <= 60
83	    return True
84	mb = sig["play_type"].isin(BUY_TIERS); sig = sig[(~mb) | sig.apply(svk, axis=1)].copy()
85	# overheat on latest date
86	vni = bq(f"SELECT t.time,t.Close,t.MA200,t.D_RSI FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t WHERE t.ticker='VNINDEX' AND t.time BETWEEN DATE '{START}' AND DATE '{END}'")
87	vni["time"] = pd.to_datetime(vni["time"])
88	st = bq(f"SELECT s.time,s.state FROM tav2_bq.{DT_TABLE} AS s WHERE s.time BETWEEN DATE '{START}' AND DATE '{END}'"); st["time"] = pd.to_datetime(st["time"])
89	v = vni.merge(st, on="time", how="left"); v["state"] = v["state"].ffill()
90	oh = set(v[(v["Close"]/v["MA200"] > 1.30) & ((v["state"] == 5) | (v["D_RSI"] > 0.75))]["time"])
91	sig.loc[sig["time"].isin(oh) & sig["play_type"].isin(BUY_TIERS), "play_type"] = "AVOID_overheated"
92	
93	# ── 3. today's eligible BA-core signals ──
94	today = sig[(sig["time"] == LATEST) & sig["play_type"].isin(TIER_BAL)].copy()
95	sec_map = bq("SELECT DISTINCT t.ticker,CAST(FLOOR(t.ICB_Code/1000) AS INT64) AS s FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t WHERE t.ICB_Code IS NOT NULL").set_index("ticker")["s"].to_dict()
96	today["sec"] = today["ticker"].map(sec_map)
97	today["prio"] = today["play_type"].map(PRIORITY)
98	top30 = set(bq("""SELECT t.ticker FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t WHERE t.time BETWEEN DATE '2020-01-01' AND DATE '2025-01-01'
99	AND t.ticker IN (SELECT DISTINCT t2.ticker FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune AS t2)
100	GROUP BY t.ticker ORDER BY AVG(t.Volume_3M_P50*t.Close) DESC LIMIT 30""")["ticker"])
101	
102	def select_book(cand, universe=None):
103	    c = cand if universe is None else cand[cand["ticker"].isin(universe)]
104	    c = c.sort_values(["prio", "ta"], ascending=[True, False])
105	    picked, fin_re = [], 0
106	    for _, r in c.iterrows():
107	        if len(picked) >= MAX_POS: break
108	        is_finre = (r["sec"] == 8)
109	        exempt = (r["play_type"] == "RE_BACKLOG_BUY")
110	        if is_finre and not exempt and fin_re >= 4: continue
111	        picked.append(r)
112	        if is_finre and not exempt: fin_re += 1
113	    return pd.DataFrame(picked)
114	
115	bal = select_book(today)
116	vn30 = select_book(today, universe=top30)
117	
118	# ── 4. ensemble mode today (M1 cached + M3r live, AND-hold) → which 2nd leg ──
119	mode_today, mode_label = 1, "VN30 (V11-mode)"
120	try:
121	    cached = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR, "compare_v11_v12_concentration_switch.csv"), index_col=0, parse_dates=True)
122	    sig_m1 = cached["sig_m1"].dropna().astype(int)
123	    m3 = bq(f"""WITH base AS (SELECT t.time,t.ticker,
124	      SAFE_DIVIDE(t.Close,LAG(t.Close,126) OVER (PARTITION BY t.ticker ORDER BY t.time))-1 AS r6,
125	      AVG(t.Volume_3M_P50*t.Close) OVER (PARTITION BY t.ticker ORDER BY t.time ROWS BETWEEN 252 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING) AS a1
126	      FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t WHERE t.time BETWEEN DATE '2013-01-01' AND DATE '{END}'
127	      AND t.ticker IN (SELECT DISTINCT t2.ticker FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune AS t2)),
128	    ranked AS (SELECT time,r6,a1,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY time ORDER BY a1 DESC) AS rnk FROM base WHERE a1 IS NOT NULL AND r6 IS NOT NULL)
129	    SELECT time, AVG(IF(rnk<=10,r6,NULL))-AVG(r6) AS M3r FROM ranked GROUP BY time ORDER BY time""")
130	    m3["time"] = pd.to_datetime(m3["time"]); m3r = m3.set_index("time")["M3r"]
131	    em = m3r.dropna().sort_index().expanding(min_periods=252).median()
132	    sig_m3r = (m3r.dropna().sort_index() > em).astype(int).reindex(m3r.index).ffill().fillna(1).astype(int).shift(1).fillna(1).astype(int)
133	    idx = sig_m3r.index
134	    m1 = sig_m1.reindex(idx).ffill().fillna(1).astype(int)
135	    cur = int(m1.iloc[0])
136	    for a, b in zip(m1.values, sig_m3r.values):
137	        if a == b: cur = int(a)
138	    mode_today = cur
139	    mode_label = "VN30 (V11-mode)" if cur == 1 else "LAGGED earnings-drift (V12-mode)"
140	except Exception as e:
141	    print(f"  WARNING: ensemble mode fallback to VN30 ({e})")
142	
143	# ── 5. LAGGED entries due today (only relevant if LAGGED-mode) ──
144	lagged_due = []
145	try:
146	    with open(os.path.join(WORKDIR, "earnings_events_classified.csv")) as _f: pass
147	    ev = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR, "earnings_events_classified.csv"), parse_dates=["Release_Date"])
148	    ev = ev.sort_values(["ticker", "Release_Date"]).reset_index(drop=True)
149	    LN2 = np.log(2); HL = 3.0; ev["prior_n_good"] = 0; ev["pa_HL3"] = np.nan
150	    for tk, g in ev.groupby("ticker"):
151	        hist = []
152	        for ri in g.index.tolist():
153	            row = ev.loc[ri]; cd = row["Release_Date"]; ng = len(hist); ev.at[ri, "prior_n_good"] = ng
154	            if ng >= 1:
155	                da = pd.to_datetime([d for d, _ in hist]); pa = np.array([p for _, p in hist])
156	                ay = (cd - da).days.values / 365.25; w = np.exp(-LN2 * ay / HL)
157	                ev.at[ri, "pa_HL3"] = (pa * w).sum() / w.sum() if w.sum() > 0 else np.nan
158	            if pd.notna(row["NP_R"]) and row["NP_R"] >= 15 and pd.notna(row["post_ret"]): hist.append((cd, row["post_ret"]))
159	    cand = ev[(ev["NP_R"] >= 15) & (ev["prior_n_good"] >= 4) & (ev["pa_HL3"] >= 5)].copy()
160	    # entry = Release_Date + 5 trading days; due within the last 1 trading day up to today
161	    cand["entry_approx"] = cand["Release_Date"] + pd.Timedelta(days=7)   # ~5 trading days
162	    due = cand[(cand["entry_approx"] >= LATEST - pd.Timedelta(days=3)) & (cand["entry_approx"] <= LATEST + pd.Timedelta(days=1))]
163	    lagged_due = sorted(due["ticker"].unique().tolist())
164	except Exception as e:
165	    print(f"  WARNING: LAGGED schedule unavailable ({e})")
166	
167	# ── 6. ETF parking (BASE) ──
168	etf_frac = ETF_BASE.get(state_today, 0.0)
169	
170	# ── 7. emit recommendations ──
171	def book_rows(df, book):
172	    rows = []
173	    for _, r in df.iterrows():
174	        rows.append({"book": book, "ticker": r["ticker"], "play_type": r["play_type"],
175	                     "ta": round(float(r["ta"]), 0), "close": round(float(r["Close"]), 1),
176	                     "sector": int(r["sec"]) if pd.notna(r["sec"]) else None, "weight_pct": POS_PCT*100})
177	    return rows
178	
179	active_second = "VN30" if mode_today == 1 else "LAGGED"
180	recs = book_rows(bal, "BAL(50%)")
181	if mode_today == 1:
182	    recs += book_rows(vn30, "VN30(50%)")
183	else:
184	    # LAGGED-mode: emit the earnings-drift entries due today into the CSV too (consumed by daily report)
185	    for tk in lagged_due:
186	        recs.append({"book": "LAGGED(50%)", "ticker": tk, "play_type": "LAGGED_DRIFT",
187	                     "ta": None, "close": None, "sector": sec_map.get(tk), "weight_pct": POS_PCT*100})
188	rec_df = pd.DataFrame(recs)
189	csv_path = os.path.join(OUTDIR, f"golive_recommendations_{END}.csv")
190	rec_df.to_csv(csv_path, index=False)
191	
192	L = []
193	L.append(f"# V4 + DT5G — Daily Recommendations — {END}\n")
194	L.append(f"*Generated {datetime.now():%Y-%m-%d %H:%M}. System: V121_ENS + BASE parking, gated DT5G state (fail-safe DT4). Sizing 10% NAV/slot, max {MAX_POS}, hold 45d, stop -20%.*\n")
195	L.append("## Regime & parking\n")
196	L.append(f"- **Market state (gated):** {state_today} = **{SNAME.get(state_today,'?')}**  (source: {prov.get('source','?')}; DT4 base={prov.get('base_state_dt4','?')}, DT5G={prov.get('macro_state_dt5g','?')})")
197	L.append(f"- **ETF parking target (BASE):** park **{etf_frac*100:.0f}%** of idle cash in E1VFVN30" + (" (NEUTRAL)" if state_today == 3 else ""))
198	if state_today in (1, 2):
199	    L.append(f"- ⚠️ **{SNAME[state_today]}** — BA-core entries blocked (AVOID_bear); de-risk / hold cash.")
200	L.append(f"- **Ensemble mode today:** {mode_label} → 2nd-leg book = **{active_second}**\n")
201	L.append(f"## BAL book ([REDACTED]-on 50%) — {len(bal)} picks\n")
202	if len(bal):
203	    L.append("| ticker | tier | ta | close | sector | weight |")
204	    L.append("|---|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|")
205	    for _, r in bal.iterrows():
206	        L.append(f"| {r['ticker']} | {r['play_type']} | {float(r['ta']):.0f} | {float(r['Close']):.1f} | {int(r['sec']) if pd.notna(r['sec']) else '-'} | {POS_PCT*100:.0f}% |")
207	else:
208	    L.append("_No new BA-core entries today_ — in this regime there are no qualifying signals in V4's "
209	             "BAL tiers (MEGA/MOMENTUM*/DEEP_VALUE_RECOVERY/RE_BACKLOG). **Action: hold existing positions "
210	             "(45d) and park idle cash per the parking target above.** This is normal conservative behavior "
211	             "in NEUTRAL, not an error.")
212	# informational: buy-ish signals that exist today but are OUTSIDE V4's BAL tiers
213	_latest = sig[sig["time"] == LATEST]
214	_info = _latest[_latest["play_type"].isin(["COMPOUNDER_BUY", "S_PRO", "MOMENTUM_QUALITY", "MOMENTUM_S_N"])]
215	if len(_info):
216	    L.append(f"\n_Informational (signals today OUTSIDE V4 BAL tiers, not traded by V4):_ " +
217	             ", ".join(f"{r['ticker']}({r['play_type']})" for _, r in _info.head(12).iterrows()))
218	L.append("")
219	if mode_today == 1:
220	    L.append(f"## 2nd leg = VN30 book (50%) — {len(vn30)} picks\n")
221	    if len(vn30):
222	        L.append("| ticker | tier | ta | close | sector | weight |")
223	        L.append("|---|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|")
224	        for _, r in vn30.iterrows():
225	            L.append(f"| {r['ticker']} | {r['play_type']} | {float(r['ta']):.0f} | {float(r['Close']):.1f} | {int(r['sec']) if pd.notna(r['sec']) else '-'} | {POS_PCT*100:.0f}% |")
226	    else:
227	        L.append("_(no eligible VN30 signals today)_")
228	else:
229	    L.append("## 2nd leg = LAGGED earnings-drift (50%)\n")
230	    L.append("Ensemble is in V12/LAGGED mode → 2nd-leg capital follows the earnings-drift book "
231	             "(buy T+5 after strong earnings, hold ~25 trading days). Entries due ~now:\n")
232	    L.append("- " + (", ".join(lagged_due) if lagged_due else "_(no LAGGED entries due in the last few sessions)_"))
233	L.append(f"\n## Notes\n- Position sizing: {POS_PCT*100:.0f}% NAV per slot, BASE parking keeps ~30% cash buffer in NEUTRAL.")
234	L.append(f"- Fin/RE (sector 8) capped at 4 positions per book (RE_BACKLOG_BUY exempt).")
235	L.append(f"- This is the V4 (BASE) config. State is the fail-safe gated series; if macro feeds were unhealthy the source would read 'DT4_only'.")
236	L.append(f"- CSV: `out/golive_recommendations_{END}.csv`")
237	md_path = os.path.join(OUTDIR, f"golive_recommendations_{END}.md")
238	open(md_path, "w", encoding="utf-8").write("\n".join(L))
239	
240	print(f"\n  state={state_today}({SNAME.get(state_today,'?')})  parking={etf_frac*100:.0f}%  ensemble={mode_label}")
241	print(f"  BAL picks: {len(bal)} | 2nd leg: {active_second} ({len(vn30) if mode_today==1 else len(lagged_due)} items)")
242	print(f"  -> {md_path}")
243	print(f"  -> {csv_path}")
244	print("DONE.")
